summary: The diff implements REQ-13, REQ-14, and REQ-15 to varying degrees. REQ-13 (wiring the login button to Internet Identity with loading state and error handling) is well-implemented. REQ-15 (responsive layout) appears addressed with responsive Tailwind classes. REQ-14 is partially implemented on the frontend (profile setup modal for first-time users, redirect to dashboard, duplicate prevention via profile check), but the backend uniqueness enforcement via a dedicated createUserProfile function is not clearly visible in the truncated diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: The backend createUserProfile function (or equivalent) enforces uniqueness by principal ID, preventing duplicate profiles for the same principal.
missing_requirements.reason: The backend diff shows saveCallerUserProfile which appears to be an upsert/overwrite rather than a create-with-uniqueness-check. No dedicated createUserProfile function with an explicit uniqueness guard is visible in the truncated backend/main.mo diff.

hallucinated_features.description: Handling of 'User is already authenticated' error by calling clear() and re-invoking login() after a 300ms timeout.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not specify any re-authentication flow or handling of an already-authenticated state edge case. This logic was added beyond what was requested.
